• Interactive Magic 8 Ball with 3D WebGL particle effects and shake animations
  • Offers 5 selectable response personalities (friendly, mean, silly, dramatic, roast) using OpenRouter AI
  • Includes input validation, loading states, and smooth text transitions for answers
    const MODEL = "google/gemma-3n-e2b-it:free";
    fetch("https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/chat/completions")

This interactive Magic 8 Ball web app features a 3D particle background and dynamic shake animations when generating answers. Users can choose from multiple personality styles and input questions to receive AI-generated responses via the OpenRouter API. The app includes input validation, loading states, and smooth text transitions to ensure a seamless user experience.
